div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Liberia (Reber)
div.p: 103. Department’s telegram No. 100, November 13, 1 p.m. I received the Liberian Consul General at noon today and handed him a memorandum which I requested he communicate without delay to the President of Liberia.
[Here follow summary and extracts from the memorandum, printed on page 369.]

Should President King question you with regard to the memorandum, I believe it would be desirable to make no comment other than the statement that you had been informed of its delivery by your Government.
